query:
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR email LIKE '%test%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'leads' as tabela, COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%Test%' OR email LIKE '%test%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'projects' as tabela, COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE nome LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%Test%';
